services.title: Residential Interiors
services.description: From living rooms and bedrooms to wardrobes, bathrooms, and kitchens, we shape homes around your lifestyle.

services.title: Commercial Office Interiors
services.description: Professional office interiors, reception areas, workstations, cafes, and retail spaces designed for function and brand impact.

services.title: Interior Consultation
services.description: Thoughtful planning, design direction, and material guidance to help every decision feel clear and intentional.

services.title: Turnkey Execution
services.description: From concept to completion, our team manages interiors with creativity, professionalism, and detail.

reasons: Plan designs tailored to the space and lifestyle
Client consultation with a practical, transparent approach
Design choices that add style, function, and lasting value

projects.name: Living Rooms
projects.description: Comfort-first living spaces with visual warmth, practical planning, and details that make everyday life feel elevated.

projects.name: Commercial Offices
projects.description: Efficient office environments with better workflow, clearer zoning, and a polished professional identity.

projects.name: Kitchens and Wardrobes
projects.description: Functional storage and kitchen layouts built to improve comfort, movement, and everyday usability.

process.title: Discover
process.text: We understand your space, goals, style preferences, and practical constraints before proposing direction.

process.title: Design
process.text: Layouts, moodboards, material selections, and 3D views help you see the space before execution begins.

process.title: Deliver
process.text: Our team coordinates production, site work, and finishing details with timeline and quality control in focus.

founders.name: Shaik Shoiab
founders.vision: To build Power On Interio into a trusted interior brand known for timeless design, practical execution, and client-first service.

faqs.question: Do you offer complete interior design and execution?
faqs.answer: Yes. Power On Interio handles both design and turnkey execution, from concept planning and material selection to on-site coordination, finishing, and handover.

faqs.question: Which cities do you currently serve?
faqs.answer: We currently provide interior services in Bangalore, Chennai, and Hyderabad for residential interiors, office interiors, and turnkey commercial projects.

faqs.question: Are your services available 24/7?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team offers 24/7 support for client coordination, project updates, and urgent execution requirements so communication stays smooth throughout the project.

faqs.question: Do you take residential as well as commercial projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work on home interiors, modular kitchens, wardrobes, living spaces, office interiors, workstations, reception areas, and other commercial design requirements.

faqs.question: How do I get a quotation for my interior project?
faqs.answer: You can contact us with your location, project type, space size, and requirements. Our team will discuss the scope, understand your needs, and guide you toward the right quotation and design approach.

faqs.question: How long does an interior project usually take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines depend on the size, scope, and finish level, but we always aim for clear planning, realistic timelines, and smooth execution so you know what to expect at every stage.
